FAKE UPI & REWARDS SCAM! 🚨🤮 Used heavily for 5 months, got ZERO rewards. UPI cashback promises are 100% fake. They lied about "1 Jewel = ₹1" to trap us, then devalued everything. Referral is just a data-harvesting scam to steal friends' KYC. Worst part? They randomly freeze accounts, hold real money hostage, and ghost you with brainless support bots. Check the "Rewards Program" tab—everyone is screaming the same truth. A toxic bait-and-switch trap. AVOID!

Very disappointing experience. I applied for the credit card first because the app never clearly informed me that doing so could prevent me from opening a Jupiter Savings Account. My actual requirement was a savings account with an account number and IFSC, but after completing the credit card KYC, I found out I couldn't proceed with the savings account. This important restriction should be made clear before users apply. The lack of transparency wasted my time and caused unnecessary frustration.

​I am increasingly frustrated with the Jupiter app. The lack of human support for urgent credit card issues is a major red flag. On top of that, the app design is intentionally difficult to navigate—it shouldn't take ten clicks just to view basic transaction history. The fact that transactions are grouped by calendar month instead of the billing cycle makes tracking my own spending a chore. I’m only sticking around for the rewards, but the lack of transparency is becoming a dealbreaker. Fix it!!

Reduce minimum Digital Gold sell amount Hello Jupiter Team, Earlier, the minimum sell amount for Digital Gold was ₹2, which was very convenient for users. The new minimum sell amount of ₹10 reduces flexibility, especially for small investors. Please consider restoring the minimum sell amount to ₹2. It helps users withdraw only the amount they need, test the sell feature with a small value, and improves the overall user experience.

Jupiter is genuinely one of the best apps I’ve used. The Pots feature is brilliant, and Xtraboost is a standout idea. My only big request is to let Xtraboost work inside a Pot too—especially for an emergency fund Pot. That money should keep earning while still remaining accessible whenever needed. It feels like the perfect upgrade for truly idle savings. It would make emergency savings feel smarter, more rewarding, and far more useful for users like me every single day. Pots don't earn interest.
